description_long: This is a sleek, modern coupe car with a deep red exterior and a streamlined, aerodynamic body. The front features a prominent, angular grille with chrome accents and sharp, narrow headlights, giving it an assertive look. The side profile reveals a gently sloping roofline, flush door handles, and blacked-out window trim, contributing to its sporty appearance. The wheels are multi-spoke alloys with a dark finish, and the car sits relatively low to the ground, emphasizing its performance-oriented design. At the rear, the taillights are slim and wrap around the corners, with a subtle integrated spoiler and dual exhaust outlets. The windows are tinted, and the overall build suggests a premium, urban-focused coupe with attention to both aesthetics and functionality.
description: A modern, deep red coupe car with a sporty, aerodynamic design, chrome-accented grille, and dark alloy wheels. Features include tinted windows, slim headlights and taillights, and a gently sloping roofline.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bold grille, sharp headlights, and sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the coupe's sloping roofline, flush door handles, and alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays slim taillights, an integrated spoiler, and dual exhausts.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the window configuration and sporty stance.
